calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Linda Reyes, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and Rosalyn Bell-Martin appeared in pro per. There was no appearance by co-defendant Dwain Alexander. The matter did not settled and remains on the trial calendar.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant ROSLYN MARTIN BELL in propria persona 824-3762 demurring to the Amended Complaint
Nicole Lambros, Esq. of 596-4647 specially appearing for the Law Firm of KIMBALL, TIREY & ST. JOHN counsel for Plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant Roslyn Martin Bell's demurrer to amended complaint is OVERRULED; 5 days leave to answer. (JJM/301/DR) Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jul-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
